phase1_blurb: A Tamil-first assistant for everyday government errands — birth certificates, NIC, Samurdhi, pensions. Find the right office, fee, form, and hours without a wasted trip.
phase2_blurb: Help households assemble defensible evidence of land ownership — photographs, GPS, witness statements, scanned deeds — versioned and tier-labelled.
phase3_blurb: Connect Northern Province producers — Jaffna mango, palmyra, dried fish — to verified buyers with provenance trails from harvest to point of sale.
